title: 2Pcs Pressure Relief Device for Triton,Pressure Relief Device PRD with Disc Seals Cover Valve, Compatible with Triton Electric Shower (Replace of 82800450)
features: Triton Pressure Relief Device ● Made of high-quality ABS material, it is safe and durable to keep your Triton Electric Shower working properly.
Perfect Replacement ● This pressure relief device adopts a seal cover design, which not only will not leak but also will burst for protection when the pressure of your showers is too high and safer.
Easy to use ● Just need to replace the old pressure relief valve and put the new one back in place.
Widely Compatible with ● Our pressure relief device is compatible with triton electric showers (For all compatible models, please refer to the picture description).

After-sales Service ● If you are not satisfied with using the triton Pressure Relief Device, we will refund every penny you have! We guarantee fast refund or replacement, please feel free to contact us for help.
